response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 20 years of full-stack experience and promising recent work on MCP/AI infrastructure at Naver, but fundamentally fails to meet the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. Missing critical technical depth in Python (primary language), vector databases, RAG architectures, and specialized data pipeline engineering. Recent pivot to AI work (April 2025) is encouraging but insufficient to satisfy core qualifications.
strengths: Staff-level seniority with demonstrated technical leadership across multiple senior/staff roles and proven mentorship through workshops, code katas, and community contributions
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver, showing trajectory into required domain
Proven ability to work across full technology stack and learn new domains (mobile, robotics, data systems, infrastructure)
concerns: Lacks demonstrated 8+ years of production-grade AI solution development; AI/ML infrastructure work started April 2025 and represents career pivot rather than deep expertise
No Python experience despite being a primary required language; career centered on TypeScript and full-stack web development rather than AI/ML systems
Missing expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, and AI-focused data pipelines—all core required qualifications not evidenced in resume

key_factors.factor: Vector DB and RAG architecture expertise
